header.title: Source of Funds
header.description: Pick the purpose first, then review the evidence path.

planned.title: Planned exchange sale
planned.body: Prepare a bank or exchange disclosure before the deposit or sale happens.

existing.title: Already happened
existing.body: Explain a completed sale, exchange deposit, withdrawal, or transfer.

purpose.plannedHint: Planned reports prove the reviewed history of the bitcoin you intend to sell. If those sats were originally bought on an exchange, attach fiat-funds proof to that purchase source as a separate evidence item.

bankNote.label: Bank disclosure note
bankNote.placeholder: Expected EUR proceeds, bank contact, or internal case note

actionsBar.assembleHint: Kassiber assembles every hop it can prove from local evidence: transaction inputs/outputs of synced wallets (Bitcoin and Liquid), Lightning payment hashes, platform ids, and reviewed pairs. The more wallets and connections this book has, the more complete the assembled flow. You document only what remains.
actionsBar.manualReviewHint_one: {{count}} weak or chain-observation suggestion still needs manual review.
actionsBar.manualReviewHint_other: {{count}} weak or chain-observation suggestions still need manual review.

gapDefaults.label: Reviewed missing history
gapDefaults.description: Prior history is missing and has been reviewed as a disclosure gap.

export.intro: Review what the report will expose before exporting. Export is available only when all blockers are cleared, and the PDF includes reviewed evidence only.

exportStage.title: Freeze and hand over
exportStage.lede: Export renders from a saved immutable case snapshot. Live edits never change a handed-over dossier, and later re-renders use the same reviewed case data even though generated file metadata may differ.

reviewQueue.title: Review Queue
reviewQueue.description: Matched links for the selected target, plus suggested upstream hops that can extend the path.
reviewQueue.empty: No matched links yet. Kassiber will look for same-id transfers, reviewed pairs, provider ids, and tight amount/time hints.

linkReview.title: Link Review
linkReview.description: Accept, reject, allocate, and attach evidence.

sourceOrGap.title: Source Or Gap
sourceOrGap.description: Add a reviewed root source or explicit missing-history stop.
sourceOrGap.label: Label

manualLink.title: Manual Link
manualLink.description: Connect two known transactions with explicit allocation.

gates.title: Gates
gates.previewUnavailable: No source-funds report can be built for this target yet.

disclosure.title: Disclosure
disclosure.narrative: This {{purpose}} will disclose the reviewed flow for {{target}}. It will expose {{txids}}, {{evidence}}, {{links}}, and {{sources}}.
disclosure.noPreview: No disclosure preview is available yet.
disclosure.walletPrivacyNote: Kassiber does not include descriptors, xpubs, wallet files, seeds, backend tokens, or unrelated wallet history in the PDF.

caseBrief.noPreview: Local case data is not available yet.

coverage.summary: {{amount}} BTC fully traced across {{count}} inbound transactions
coverage.noInbound: No inbound transactions in this profile yet.
coverage.truncated: Coverage truncated to {{shown}} of {{total}} inbound transactions ({{notClassified}} not classified). Run <0>source-funds coverage</0> with a higher --max-transactions to compute the full set.

recipient.empty: No recipients defined yet. Run <0>source-funds recipients create</0> to set a sticky reveal-mode default per recipient.
recipient.title: Recipient
recipient.hint: The recipient's preferred reveal mode is shown as advisory below; your reveal-mode choice is what gets exported.
recipient.advisory: {{label}} prefers <0>{{preferred}}</0>. Your current reveal mode is <1>{{current}}</1>.

toast.manualLinkBody: The reviewed flow has been updated.
toast.sourcePathBody: The source-funds path has been updated.
